ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock ID */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price entry */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the stock price entry */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the stock price entry */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the stock price entry */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded */,
  "dividend" REAL /* Dividend paid per share */,
  "split_coefficient" REAL /* Split coefficient for stock splits */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol or ticker */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company operates in */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the company is listed */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* IPO date */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is headquartered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange FOREIGN KEY ("exchange") REFERENCES stock_exchanges ("exchange_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "exchange_country" TEXT /* Country where the stock exchange is located */,
  "exchange_timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the stock exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was created */,
  "portfolio_type" TEXT /* Type of the portfolio (e.g., long-only, hedged) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_stocks" (
  "portfolio_stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio stock entry */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "allocation_percentage" REAL /* Percentage allocation of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "entry_date" TEXT /* Date the stock was added to the portfolio */,
  "exit_date" TEXT /* Date the stock was removed from the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, portfolio manager, admin) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., API, CSV file) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL or endpoint of the data source */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for accessing the data source */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data updates (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., JSON, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_ingestions" (
  "ingestion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data ingestion event */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "ingestion_date" TEXT /* Date the data was ingested */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data ingestion (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the ingestion failed */,
  "ingestion_type" TEXT /* Type of ingestion (e.g., full, incremental) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ingestion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_ingestions_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "query_parameters" TEXT /* Query parameters used for accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_screeners" (
  "screener_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock screener */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the screener */,
  "screener_name" TEXT /* Name of the screener */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the screener */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the screener was created */,
  "screener_parameters" TEXT /* Screener parameters (e.g., sector, industry) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("screener_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_screeners_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "screener_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each screener result */,
  "screener_id" INTEGER /* ID of the screener */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date the result was generated */,
  "pass_fail" TEXT /* Pass or fail status of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_screener_results_screener_id FOREIGN KEY ("screener_id") REFERENCES stock_screeners ("screener_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_screener_results_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
